sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28658" key="dusanablaste/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσ-αναβλαστέω</orth>, prob. <sense id="n28658.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">δυσαναβλυστέω</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">well up with difficulty</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.688e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
